name: FinalBoss — Crypto Backtest Engine
description: Open-Source Crypto Backtest Tool — 71+ Strategien, Walk-Forward, Monte Carlo, Paper Trading, TikTok-Strategy-Reviewer. Alles im Browser, ohne Account.
